features.name: multiply then divide by same constant identity pattern
features.description: Code should include a multiplication by a constant followed by division by the same constant, producing an identity operation that synthesis should optimize away

features.name: intermediate wire wider than operands in arithmetic chain
features.description: Code should include an intermediate wire with wider bit-width than both input and output, used to carry the result of an arithmetic operation before narrowing back via a second operation

features.name: constant folding of inverse arithmetic operations
features.description: Code should include chained arithmetic operations with compile-time known constant operands that form inverse pairs (multiply and divide by same value), testing the tool's ability to constant-fold them
features.snippet:
assign t = i * K;
assign o = t / K;
